slogan.const: Every Affair Has a Story. Some End in Murder.

voice_id.description: Jimmy - Canadian Podcast Narration (male, Canadian accent, formal, narrative_story use-case). Verified via live TTS test 2026-07-19 — the MCP tool's silent default produced a female voice, which is wrong for this channel, so voice_id must always be passed explicitly.

voice_model.description: Stable long-form narration without emotion tags, per this channel's voiceover policy — see Agents/voice_production_agent.md.

publishing_pace.description: Encodes the channel owner's own release strategy — see fatal-affairs-project-brief.md

shorts.description: See Agents/shorts_agent.md — decided 2026-07-19 after real 2026 completion-rate/view-count research (5,400-Short sample), not a guess.

max_seconds.description: Hard cap, not a range. 30-45s is the actual sweet spot for total views + algorithm weighting per 2026 data — shorter caps win on completion % alone but lose on raw views/rewatch signal.

caption_font.description: Reuses the channel's existing body font (see channel.fonts.body) rather than introducing a new one, for brand consistency.

caption_highlight_color.description: Reuses the channel's existing accent color (see channel.colors.accent) for the word-by-word karaoke highlight, instead of the generic yellow default seen elsewhere in the genre.

background_music.description: See Tools/royalty_free_music_tool.md — added 2026-07-19, a real gap (no background music was specified anywhere before this). Confirmed 2026-07-19 (by directly reading Pixabay's API docs): no source checked is both free and automatable via API, so the default is a hand-picked, reusable local bed-track set, not a live per-video fetch.

provider.description: local_bed_track_set: 10 tracks hand-picked from Pixabay Music (free/safe, no public API — confirmed 2026-07-19), stored at ProductionStudio/Assets/audio/music_bed/bed_01.mp3..bed_10.mp3 (gitignored). One is picked and looped/trimmed per render (main video or Short) via Tools/royalty_free_music_tool.md's get_bed_track(). elevenlabs: automated fallback via generate_music(), costs credits per generation.

mood_prompt.const: Tense, anxious true-crime documentary background music. Slow ominous pulsing low drone, subtle dissonant piano, minimal percussion, building unease without becoming dramatic or melodic. Netflix true-crime documentary underscore style.
mood_prompt.description: Fixed default mood direction for every video, for consistent channel atmosphere. Subtle, investigative, emotionally controlled — never overwhelms narration. Used as search tags for the free-library providers, or as a generation prompt for the elevenlabs fallback.

mix_db_below_voiceover.description: -18 to -20dB below the voiceover, never less than -15dB below (masking risk). See remotion_assembly_tool.md's 'Background music mixing' section.
